prompt: Create a cinematic surreal digital artwork of a young adult man floating horizontally above a wet city rooftop at night, as if weightless and flying forward, with arms stretched outward for balance and legs trailing behind. He wears a dark oversized long coat flaring dramatically in the wind, a gray hoodie underneath, slim black pants, and light gray sneakers. Show his face front-facing but softly blurred/featureless, with short dark hair visible. The camera is slightly low and close, making the body large in the frame, angled from left-front to right-back. The rooftop foreground is glossy with rainwater reflections, small vents and roof fixtures, and warm orange reflections from lantern light. In the background, show a dense modern skyline of skyscrapers with cool blue-white window lights, softly out of focus. The sky is deep navy and star-filled, with exactly 30 visible glowing orange paper sky lanterns: 1 very large lantern dominating the upper left foreground, 1 medium lantern directly behind the subject’s head, 1 medium lantern high near the upper center-left, 1 medium lantern high near the upper right, 1 small lantern near the top center, 1 small lantern near the top right edge, 1 tilted rectangular lantern upper right-center, 1 small lantern right of the subject’s hand, 1 small lantern just above the skyline at far left, 1 small lantern near the lower left edge, 1 small lantern above the left skyline, 1 small lantern low left-center, 1 tiny lantern near the subject’s left arm, 1 tiny lantern between the large lantern and the subject, 1 tiny lantern above the subject’s shoulder, 1 tiny lantern near the subject’s right elbow, 1 tiny lantern near the right skyline, and 13 additional tiny distant lanterns scattered across the starry sky. Use warm amber lantern glow contrasted against cool blue night tones, high-detail photorealistic fantasy style, dramatic rim lighting, shallow depth of field, rain-slick reflections, no text, no watermark.
